Bunny is fast asleep now... 💤 sweet dreams start with a story!

Meet the character

Hi, I'm Bunny! 🐰

I love playing, jumping, and going on adventures all day long. I've got a big heart and even bigger dreams.

But when the stars come out... I have one little problem.

I don't want to sleep!
More little animal friends, coming soon
🦊 Fox
🐼 Panda
🐘 Ellie
🦁 Leo
Perfect for ages 3–8

Bunny Won't Sleep

A Little Animal Adventures Story

Bunny would rather jump, play, and chase fireflies than climb into bed. But when the Moon and the Stars step in, Bunny discovers that bedtime might just be the best adventure of all — a gentle, giggly read to close out any wide-awake day.

🛒 Read it on Amazon

Peek inside the book 👀

A few pages from Bunny's bedtime adventure — the whole story unfolds on Kindle & paperback.

✨ Coming soon

ABC with Bunny

A playful coloring & learning book — Bunny helps little hands practice letters while having a giggly adventure on every page.

Why Tiny Tales Studio

We create heartwarming children's books that inspire imagination, kindness, and sweet bedtime moments — one little animal adventure at a time.

⭐

Imagination

Playful stories that turn ordinary bedtimes into magical little adventures.

💗

Kindness

Gentle characters and warm lessons that stay with little hearts.

🌙

Bedtime Magic

Cozy, calming reads designed to end the day on the softest note.

P

"I wrote Bunny Won't Sleep for every little one who thinks bedtime is the end of the fun — I wanted to show them it can be its own gentle adventure."

— Poonam D, Author & Founder, Tiny Tales Studio

Parent questions, answered

It's written for little dreamers ages 3–8 — perfect as a read-aloud or an early independent read.

It's available as a Kindle eBook on Amazon now. Tap "Read it on Amazon" above for the latest format options.

Yes! "Bunny Won't Sleep" is the first story in our Little Animal Adventures series — more little animal friends are on the way.

We're working on "ABC with Bunny," a coloring and learning book, plus new adventures with Bunny's friends.
